title: Organ Donation Data Improved with HPC
summary: Named feature on Vikas Pal's work using Soteria HPC to process large-scale kidney transplant data, run ML models on CT scans, and extract data from nearly 1 million PDF reports. Quoted directly in the article.

title: Secure Analysis Enclave Enables Advanced Tools to Improve Kidney Care
publication: University of Arizona · Data Science Institute
summary: Coverage of the team's use of secure data enclaves to analyze sensitive kidney care datasets and develop advanced clinical ML tools.
